text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yes! You're from America too, aren'cha?<n>Don'cha
miss the taste of a good<n>barbeque?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hm... To be honest, I personally prefer<n>Japanese
food.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Most of the food I prepare myself is<n>also
Japanese in style...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Although... having American once in a<n>while
would be nice.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! I'd love to have ya!
